title: tephrosia subtriflora
intro: Tephrosia subtriflora, also known as small-flowered spider-pea or small-flowered tephrosia, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia subtriflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
